'''Chodo Habat's herd''' was a herd of [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorians]] working on the [[Telosian Restoration Project]]. They were led by [[Chodo Habat]] and his primary representative [[Moza]].

==History==
Ithorians were well recognized for their knowledge of ecospheres and biology, and thus Chodo Habat's herd was selected to restore Telos to its former glory. Complications arose when [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]], led by [[Jana Lorso]], took control of several restoration zones from the Ithorians. During [[Meetra Surik]]'s visit to [[Citadel Station]], she met with Chodo Habat and his Ithorians, and performed various [[Skirmishes on Citadel Station|tasks]] to assist their restoration efforts. Later, Jana Lorso of Czerka Corporation sent a group of [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] to [[Skirmish in the Ithorian Compound|attack]] the [[Citadel Station Ithorian Compound]], resulting in several [[Death/Legends|casualties]] for the herd. The mercenaries were then killed by Surik. In return for her services to them, Chodo allowed Surik to use one of their [[Shuttle/Legends|planetary shuttles]] to reach Telos' surface.
